"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the [Attributes extension](https://commonmark.thephpleague.com/extensions/attributes/) of the league/commonmark library (versions 1.5.0 through 2.6.x) allows remote attackers to insert malicious JavaScript calls into HTML. ### Details The league/commonmark library provides configuration options such as `html_input: 'strip'` and `allow_unsafe_links: false` to mitigate cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks by stripping raw HTML and disallowing unsafe links. However, when the Attributes Extension is enabled, it introduces a way for users to inject arbitrary HTML attributes into elements via Markdown syntax using curly braces. As a result, even with the secure configuration shown above, an attacker can inject dangerous attributes into applications using this extension via a payload such as: ```md ![](){onerror=alert(1)} ``` Which results in the following HTML: ```html

``` Which causes the JS to execute immediately on page load. ### Patches Version 2.7.0 contains three changes to prevent this XSS attack vector: - All attributes starting with `on` are considered unsafe and blocked by default - [Support for an explicit allowlist of allowed HTML attributes](https://commonmark.thephpleague.com/2.7/extensions/attributes/#configuration) - Manually-added `href` and `src` attributes now respect the existing `allow_unsafe_links` configuration option ### Workarounds If upgrading is not feasible, please consider: - Disabling the `AttributesExtension` for untrusted users - [Filtering the rendered HTML through a library like HTMLPurifier](https://commonmark.thephpleague.com/security/#additional-filtering)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00287, "percentile": 0.20535}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-05-05T20:40:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-46734"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-05-05T20:15:21Z", "published_at": "2025-05-05T20:40:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/thephpleague/commonmark/security/advisories/GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx", "https://github.com/thephpleague/commonmark/commit/f0d626cf05ad3e99e6db26ebcb9091b6cd1cd89b", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-46734", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/thephpleague/commonmark/security-advisories/GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/thephpleague/commonmark", "summary": "league/commonmark contains a XSS vulnerability in Attributes extension", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-28T10:01:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3527-qv2q-pfvx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.7.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "league/commonmark"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.5.0, < 2.7.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: league/commonmark contains a XSS vulnerability in Attributes extension
